zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blair of that Ilk於1525年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair23歲，母親Lady Helen De Ross20歲。他於1546年與Lady Margaret Cunningham在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blair of that Ilk was born in 1525, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair, was 23 and his mother, Lady Helen De Ross, was 20. He married Lady Margaret Cunningham in 1546, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1570, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blair of that Ilk est né en 1525, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Helen De Ross, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Cunningham en 1546, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1570, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blair of that Ilk 1525 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair 23 und seine Mutter Lady Helen De Ross 20. Er hat 1546 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Cunningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1570 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilkが1525年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blairは23歳，母Lady Helen De Rossは20歳であった。1546年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでLady Margaret Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk(이)가 1525년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Helen De Ross(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1546년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Lady Margaret Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blair of that Ilk родился в 1525 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Helen De Ross, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Cunningham в 1546 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1570 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
